# `/hud` Command
Changes the visibility of hud elements.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Game Directors</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/hud <target: target> <visible: HudVisibility> [hud_element: HudElement]`

## Arguments
- `hud_element`: HudElement
- `target`: target
- `visible`: HudVisibility

## Enums
### `HudElement`

#### Values
- `hunger`
- `all`
- `paperdoll`
- `armor`
- `tooltips`
- `touch_controls`
- `crosshair`
- `hotbar`
- `health`
- `progress_bar`
- `air_bubbles`
- `horse_health`
- `status_effects`
- `item_text`

### `HudVisibility`

#### Values
- `hide`
- `reset`
